title: Dave eulogy — 'so long brother till we meet again'
html:
Dave eulogy

Source: 2024-10-16 Apple Note, written from China (mid-China chapter). A short, finished eulogy paragraph for Dave — a friend who died. Yahir is grieving from across the Pacific.

TL;DR

  • One-paragraph eulogy for Dave ("My Guy Dave" from the 2021 friendship summary) — the friend died sometime around mid-October 2024
  • Yahir wrote this from China during the china chapter — couldn't be there in person
  • Words used to remember Dave: kind, goofy, adventurous, unapologetic — same energy as the 2021 friendship note
  • The "so long brother till we meet again" closer suggests Yahir believes (or wants to believe) in some form of reunion — first explicit eschatology in the corpus
  • Date-adjacent to the Valeria visit and the Shanghai coffee shop log — the China chapter as backdrop to grief

Verbatim eulogy

"Dave I'm overwhelmed with sadness knowing you are gone, but my gratitude for the memories we share cuts through the darkness. Your kind, goofy, adventurous, unapologetic soul is unforgettable. I'll miss you dearly friend, so long brother till we meet again."

Key fact

The 2021 note (2021 07 29 my guy dave) describes Dave as the friend who consistently showed up, fought for the friend group, and modeled "loyalty as default." Three years later, that friend is gone. The Dave-loss is one of the under-acknowledged emotional weights of the China chapter — Yahir was holding it from 6,000 miles away.

Open questions

  • What was the cause of death? The note doesn't say.
  • "DAV" appears in the July 2024 mega notebook TODOs ("call DAV", "shoes for DAV") — was that the same Dave, three months before he died, or a different person (Dav vs Dave)?
  • Did Yahir fly back for a service? The China-chapter timeline doesn't show a US trip in October 2024.

Related

  • 2021 07 29 my guy dave
  • china chapter
  • debt of gratitude
